metadata.purpose: A-arm G3a-readiness task list with account-side data refuel support
metadata.exclusion: Tasks requiring payment, VPN, non-MMS branches, or unsupported account changes are excluded.

scenario.reason_for_call: You are unable to send MMS messages using your messaging app for the past few hours. You want to fix it and successfully send an MMS message.
scenario.known_info: You are John Smith with phone number 555-123-2002. You are currently abroad in France.
scenario.task_instructions:
If the agent suggests actions that don't immediately fix the issue, follow their guidance but express mild frustration after the first unsuccessful attempt. You are willing to refuel 2.0 GB of data if necessary, but you do not want to change your mobile data plan. If the tool call does not return updated status information, you might need to perform another tool call to get the updated status. 
Whenever the agent asks you about your device, always ground your responses on the results of tool calls. 
For example: If the agent asks what the status bar shows, always ground your response on the results of the `get_status_bar` tool call. If the agent asks if you are able to send an MMS message, always ground your response on the results of the `can_send_mms` tool call.
Never make up the results of tool calls, always ground your responses on the results of tool calls.
If you are unsure about whether an action is necessary, always ask the agent for clarification.

arguments.summary: Customer C1001 (John Smith), line L1002 / 555-123-2002 status Active, roaming enabled, contract valid. User reports excellent 5G signal after setting network mode to 4G/5G preferred. Mobile data cannot load webpages (no connection) and MMS cannot send. Troubleshooting done: Wi‑Fi off, rebooted, toggles attempted, VPN OFF, Data Saver OFF, Wi‑Fi Calling OFF, APN reset; MMSC now set to http://mms.carrier.com/mms/wapenc; SIM status Active and SIM re-seated + reboot. Account shows data_used 15.1GB over 15GB limit but has 2.0GB data refuel available through 2025-02-28; line still has no data. Need network/provisioning check for data session/APN provisioning or network-side block/outage.

failures.false_positive_risk: medium: terminal verifier may over-continue if policy requires transfer

arguments.summary: Customer C1001 (line 555-123-2002, L1002) cannot send MMS for past few hours. Line status Active; plan P1002 Premium (15GB), data used 8.7GB. Troubleshooting completed: airplane mode off; reseated SIM; network mode changed from 2G-only to 4G/5G preferred; now strong 5G signal; mobile data enabled; APN reset/reboot; MMSC now populated; Wi‑Fi Calling off; Data Saver off; VPN off; messaging app has SMS+Storage permissions. Still receives 'cannot send MMS' error.

arguments.summary: Customer C1001 (John Smith) line L1002 (555-123-2002) cannot use cellular data or send MMS. Status bar shows good/excellent signal; switching 5G/4G only still yields 'No Connection' on speed test. SIM active. Data refueled 2GB ($4) and line is Active; plan P1002 limit 15GB + 2GB refuel, usage 15.1GB, cycle end 2025-02-28. Troubleshooting completed: APN reset + reboot, airplane mode toggle, mobile data toggle, data saver off/no restrictions, VPN off, Wi‑Fi Calling off, network mode changed to 4G only; issue persists. Needs advanced network/provisioning investigation.

failures.false_positive_risk: medium: terminal verifier may over-continue if policy requires transfer

arguments.summary: Customer C1001 (line 555-123-2002 / L1002) cannot send MMS for several hours. Line is Active, data usage 8.7/15GB (cycle ends 2025-02-28). Airplane mode was initially ON; turned OFF and now has 5G signal and mobile data works for web browsing. User rebooted device, reset APN to default + rebooted, Wi‑Fi Calling OFF, VPN OFF, Data Saver OFF, granted messaging app storage/photos permission. MMS still will not send and no error message. Likely requires network-side/MMS provisioning check.

arguments.summary: Customer reports unable to send MMS on line 555-123-2002. Completed device troubleshooting: airplane mode toggle, SIM reseat, network mode set to 4G/5G preferred (now 5G excellent), APN reset + reboot, Wi‑Fi Calling off, Wi‑Fi off, messaging app SMS+Storage permissions granted; still fails. Account C1001 Active; line L1002 status Active, roaming disabled. Data usage check shows 15.1GB used vs 15.0GB limit with 2.0GB data_refueling already; may be data cap/provisioning issue. Need further backend MMS/provisioning investigation or plan change options beyond available tools.

failures.false_positive_risk: medium: terminal verifier may over-continue if policy requires transfer

arguments.summary: Customer reports MMS not sending for line 555-123-2002. SMS send/receive works. Mobile data works with Wi‑Fi off. Wi‑Fi Calling OFF, VPN OFF, Data Saver OFF. APN reset to default + reboot done. Airplane mode toggled and SIM reseated; SIM active (no PIN/PUK). Messaging app permissions updated to allow SMS; still MMS fails (spins/'Not delivered'). Account and line status Active, not suspended. Likely carrier-side MMS provisioning issue; needs human agent escalation.

failures.false_positive_risk: medium: terminal verifier may over-continue if policy requires transfer
